title: strychnos zenkeri
intro: Strychnos zenkeri, also known as the Zenker's strychnine tree, is a plant species native to tropical Africa, belonging to the family Loganiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Strychnos zenkeri include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to reduce pain and inflammation. Herbal preparations of Strychnos zenkeri include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
